_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: QEMU - Debian 13 VM
author: noname@ecli.app
description: Run a full Debian 13 (Trixie) virtual machine using QEMU/KVM. SSH is forwarded to the server's primary allocation port. Uses cloud images for automatic provisioning.

variables.name: VM Memory (MB)
variables.description: Amount of RAM allocated to the virtual machine in megabytes.

variables.name: VM CPU Cores
variables.description: Number of CPU cores allocated to the virtual machine.

variables.name: Root Password
variables.description: Root and debian user password for the VM. Change this!

variables.name: Use Cloud Image
variables.description: Use cloud image for automatic provisioning (1=yes, 0=no/use ISO).

variables.name: Cloud Image URL
variables.description: URL to the Debian 13 cloud image (qcow2 format).

variables.name: Extra Forwarded Ports (comma-separated)
variables.description: Comma-separated list of additional host->guest port forwards. Examples: 25038,8080:80,9999/udp,3000:3000/tcp

variables.name: VM Host Bind Address
variables.description: Optional host address to bind forwards to (e.g. 0.0.0.0). Leave empty to use QEMU default.
